stations.name: Closest stations are Buranda and Coorparoo
stations.walk_minutes_note: Walkable for parts of Stones Corner.

buses.note: Bus routes serve Stones Corner via Logan Road and the South-East Busway. The Stones Corner busway station is on the doorstep.

driving.approx_cbd_minutes_offpeak_note: Approximately 6 to 10 minutes to Brisbane CBD off-peak.

lifestyle.shops_dining_note: Logan Road through Stones Corner is one of the busier village strips in the inner south with cafes, restaurants, and bars. The Stones Corner library and shopping precinct anchor daily life.

pockets.name: Logan Road village
pockets.character: Apartments and townhouses close to the strip. Walkability is the proposition.

pockets.name: Norman Creek parkland side
pockets.character: Streets close to the parkland with character home stock.

buyer_profile.note: Apartment market offers accessible inner-south entry.
